tagline: Casita Living on a Private Cul-de-Sac
neighborhood: IMG Golf Community (El Conquistador), West Bradenton
description: A 3-bedroom, 3-bath courtyard residence of 2,710 heated square feet on a private cul-de-sac in a Bradenton golf community. A flexible floor plan pairs a light-filled great room and separate leisure room with a private guest suite/casita — an ideal in-law or multigenerational space — arranged around a screened courtyard on a 9,017-square-foot homesite.

features.title: Private Cul-de-Sac Setting
features.text: Tucked at the end of a quiet cul-de-sac in an established golf community, the home offers privacy and an easy, low-traffic approach.

features.title: Guest Casita & In-Law Suite
features.text: A separate guest suite/casita (approx. 12' x 14'4") creates a true multigenerational or in-law option — perfect for extended family, guests, or a private home office.

features.title: Screened Courtyard Living
features.text: The residence is built around a screened courtyard, bringing protected indoor-outdoor living to the heart of the home in the Florida climate.

features.title: Dual Living Spaces
features.text: A great room (approx. 14'8" x 15') opens to a dining area, while a generous separate leisure room (approx. 17'4" x 13'2") gives everyday living and entertaining their own dedicated spaces.

features.title: Golf-Community Lifestyle
features.text: Set within the IMG Golf community (El Conquistador) in West Bradenton — an established, amenity-rich enclave with a notably low HOA.

features.title: West Bradenton Location
features.text: Convenient to Sarasota Bay, IMG Academy, Anna Maria Island's Gulf beaches, and SRQ International Airport.

faq.q: How large is 5839 Los Verdes Ct?
faq.a: The home offers 2,710 heated square feet with 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a 2-car garage, on a 9,017-square-foot (0.21-acre) cul-de-sac homesite in Bradenton, FL 34210.

faq.q: Does the home have a guest casita or in-law suite?
faq.a: Yes. A separate guest suite/casita provides a private in-law or multigenerational living space in addition to the main residence's bedrooms.

faq.q: Is 5839 Los Verdes Ct in a golf community?
faq.a: Yes — the residence is located within the IMG Golf community (El Conquistador) in West Bradenton.
